revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{神社 |名称 = 箕匂神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[松崎町]]峰輪331 |位置 = {{coord|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 不詳 |社格 = 旧[[村社]]、[[式内社]] |…」
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 箕匂神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[松崎町]]峰輪331 |位置 = {{coord|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 不詳 |社格 = 旧[[村社]]、[[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月14日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=箕匂神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''箕匂神社'''（みのわじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[松崎町]]峰輪（みねわ）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 松崎町の北東、峰輪地区の北側山麓に鎮座している。
[[式内社]]である箕'''勾'''神社（みのわじんじゃ）に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 みのわの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm 箕匂神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html 箕匂神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[大正]]14年（[[1925年]]）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * 不詳
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:みのわしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:松崎町の歴史]] [[Category:松崎町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

revision.comment: 1 revision imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 箕匂神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[松崎町]]峰輪331 |位置 = {{coord|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 不詳 |社格 = 旧[[村社]]、[[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月14日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=箕匂神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''箕匂神社'''（みのわじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[松崎町]]峰輪（みねわ）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 松崎町の北東、峰輪地区の北側山麓に鎮座している。
[[式内社]]である箕'''勾'''神社（みのわじんじゃ）に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 みのわの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm 箕匂神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html 箕匂神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[大正]]14年（[[1925年]]）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * 不詳
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{DEFAULTSORT:みのわしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:松崎町の歴史]] [[Category:松崎町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 箕匂神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[松崎町]]峰輪331 |位置 = {{coord|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 不詳 |社格 = 旧[[村社]]、[[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月14日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=箕匂神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''箕匂神社'''（みのわじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[松崎町]]峰輪（みねわ）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 松崎町の北東、峰輪地区の北側山麓に鎮座している。
[[式内社]]である箕'''勾'''神社（みのわじんじゃ）に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 みのわの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm 箕匂神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html 箕匂神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[大正]]14年（[[1925年]]）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * 不詳
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁

== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 箕匂神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[松崎町]]峰輪331 |位置 = {{coord|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 不詳 |社格 = 旧[[村社]]、[[式内社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 7月14日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=箕匂神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''箕匂神社'''（みのわじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[松崎町]]峰輪（みねわ）にある[[神社]]<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 松崎町の北東、峰輪地区の北側山麓に鎮座している。
[[式内社]]である箕'''勾'''神社（みのわじんじゃ）に比定され、『[[伊豆国神階帳]]』にも「従四位上 みのわの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm 箕匂神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html 箕匂神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。
[[大正]]14年（[[1925年]]）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。
== 祭神 == * 不詳
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁
==End Japanese== [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:松崎町の歴史]] [[Category:松崎町の建築物]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''箕匂神社'''（みのわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|松崎町|Q1204017}}峰輪（みねわ）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
松崎町の北東、峰輪地区の北側山麓に鎮座している。

{{jalink|式内社}}である箕'''勾'''神社（みのわじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 みのわの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm 箕匂神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html 箕匂神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}14年（{{jalink|1925年|Q18107}}）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 不詳

=== 脚注 ===

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''箕匂神社'''（みのわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|松崎町|Q1204017}}峰輪（みねわ）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
松崎町の北東、峰輪地区の北側山麓に鎮座している。

{{jalink|式内社}}である箕'''勾'''神社（みのわじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 みのわの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm 箕匂神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html 箕匂神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}14年（{{jalink|1925年|Q18107}}）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 不詳

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁

'''箕匂神社'''（みのわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|松崎町|Q1204017}}峰輪（みねわ）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
松崎町の北東、峰輪地区の北側山麓に鎮座している。

{{jalink|式内社}}である箕'''勾'''神社（みのわじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 みのわの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm 箕匂神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html 箕匂神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}14年（{{jalink|1925年|Q18107}}）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 不詳

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
|名称   = 箕匂神社
|画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|45|40.9|N|138|49|13.4|E}}}}

'''箕匂神社'''（みのわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|松崎町|Q1204017}}峰輪（みねわ）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
松崎町の北東、峰輪地区の北側山麓に鎮座している。

{{jalink|式内社}}である箕'''勾'''神社（みのわじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 みのわの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm 箕匂神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html 箕匂神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}14年（{{jalink|1925年|Q18107}}）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 不詳

=== 脚注 ===

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''箕匂神社'''（みのわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|松崎町|Q1204017}}峰輪（みねわ）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
松崎町の北東、峰輪地区の北側山麓に鎮座している。

{{jalink|式内社}}である箕'''勾'''神社（みのわじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 みのわの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm 箕匂神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html 箕匂神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}14年（{{jalink|1925年|Q18107}}）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 不詳

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''箕匂神社'''（みのわじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|松崎町|Q1204017}}峰輪（みねわ）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
松崎町の北東、峰輪地区の北側山麓に鎮座している。

{{jalink|式内社}}である箕'''勾'''神社（みのわじんじゃ）に比定され、『{{jalink|伊豆国神階帳|Q17193087}}』にも「従四位上 みのわの明神」と記されている古社である<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm 箕匂神社] - 玄松子</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html 箕匂神社] - 延喜式神社の調査</ref>。

{{jalink|大正|Q329174}}14年（{{jalink|1925年|Q18107}}）に村社に列する<ref name="engi"/>。

=== 祭神 ===
* 不詳

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 箕匂神社] - 静岡県神社庁

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Minewa, {{jalink|Matsuzaki|Q1204017}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{jalink|Taish?|Q329174}} 14 ({{jalink|1925|Q18107}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Minewa, {{jalink|Matsuzaki|Q1204017}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{jalink|Taish?|Q329174}} 14 ({{jalink|1925|Q18107}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Minewa, {{jalink|Matsuzaki|Q1204017}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{jalink|Taish?|Q329174}} 14 ({{jalink|1925|Q18107}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Minewa, {{jalink|Matsuzaki|Q1204017}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{jalink|Taish?|Q329174}} 14 ({{jalink|1925|Q18107}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Minewa, {{jalink|Matsuzaki|Q1204017}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{jalink|Taish?|Q329174}} 14 ({{jalink|1925|Q18107}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Minewa, {{jalink|Matsuzaki|Q1204017}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{jalink|Taish?|Q329174}} 14 ({{jalink|1925|Q18107}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Minewa, {{jalink|Matsuzaki|Q1204017}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{jalink|Taish?|Q329174}} 14 ({{jalink|1925|Q18107}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} in Minewa, {{jalink|Matsuzaki|Q1204017}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{jalink|Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{jalink|Taish?|Q329174}} 14 ({{jalink|1925|Q18107}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Minewa, {{ill|lt=Matsuzaki|Q1204017|WD=Q1204017}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{ill|lt=Taish?|Q329174|WD=Q329174}} 14 ({{ill|lt=1925|Q18107|WD=Q18107}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Minewa, {{ill|lt=Matsuzaki|Q1204017|WD=Q1204017}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{ill|lt=Taish?|Q329174|WD=Q329174}} 14 ({{ill|lt=1925|Q18107|WD=Q18107}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Minewa, {{ill|lt=Matsuzaki|Q1204017|WD=Q1204017}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{ill|lt=Taish?|Q329174|WD=Q329174}} 14 ({{ill|lt=1925|Q18107|WD=Q18107}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in Minewa, {{ill|lt=Matsuzaki|Q1204017|WD=Q1204017}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{ill|lt=Taish?|Q329174|WD=Q329174}} 14 ({{ill|lt=1925|Q18107|WD=Q18107}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Minewa, {{ill|lt=Matsuzaki|Q1204017|WD=Q1204017|1=Matsuzaki, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{ill|lt=Taish?|Q329174|WD=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} 14 ({{ill|lt=1925|Q18107|WD=Q18107|1=1925}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Minewa, {{ill|lt=Matsuzaki|Q1204017|WD=Q1204017|1=Matsuzaki, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{ill|lt=Taish?|Q329174|WD=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} 14 ({{ill|lt=1925|Q18107|WD=Q18107|1=1925}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Minewa, {{ill|lt=Matsuzaki|Q1204017|WD=Q1204017|1=Matsuzaki, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{ill|lt=Taish?|Q329174|WD=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} 14 ({{ill|lt=1925|Q18107|WD=Q18107|1=1925}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

=== Notes ===

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Minewa, {{ill|lt=Matsuzaki|Q1204017|WD=Q1204017|1=Matsuzaki, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{ill|lt=Taish?|Q329174|WD=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} 14 ({{ill|lt=1925|Q18107|WD=Q18107|1=1925}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Minewa, {{ill|lt=Matsuzaki|Q1204017|WD=Q1204017|1=Matsuzaki, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{ill|lt=Taish?|Q329174|WD=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} 14 ({{ill|lt=1925|Q18107|WD=Q18107|1=1925}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Minewa, {{ill|lt=Matsuzaki|Q1204017|WD=Q1204017|1=Matsuzaki, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{ill|lt=Taish?|Q329174|WD=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} 14 ({{ill|lt=1925|Q18107|WD=Q18107|1=1925}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

{{nihongo|'''Minowa Shrine'''|箕匂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Minewa, {{ill|lt=Matsuzaki|Q1204017|WD=Q1204017|1=Matsuzaki, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{ill|lt=Taish?|Q329174|WD=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} 14 ({{ill|lt=1925|Q18107|WD=Q18107|1=1925}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Minewa, {{ill|lt=Matsuzaki|Q1204017|WD=Q1204017|1=Matsuzaki, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|WD=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{ill|lt=Taish?|Q329174|WD=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} 14 ({{ill|lt=1925|Q18107|WD=Q18107|1=1925}})<ref name="engi"/>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* unknown

=== Notes ===

'''Minowa Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Minewa, {{ill|lt=Matsuzaki|Q1204017|qid=Q1204017|1=Matsuzaki, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|qid=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401133 Minowa Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located on the northern mountain foothills of the Minewa district in northeastern Matsuzaki.

It is identified as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} Minowa "Mino" Shrine (???????), and is an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|qid=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Minowa no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/minosiro_title.htm Minowa Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140301-01.html Minowa Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

It was ranked as a village shrine in {{ill|lt=Taish?|Q329174|qid=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} 14 ({{ill|lt=1925|Q18107|qid=Q18107|1=1925}})<ref name="engi"/>.
